title: aira tenuissima
intro: Aira tenuissima, also known as False Brome or Slender Hair-grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Aira tenuissima include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural expectorant. The herbal preparations of Aira tenuissima include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
